text: App crashes every single time I hit the Pay Now button. I've tried 4 times and given up. iPhone 14.
I was charged twice for order #88231 — two identical pending charges on my card. Need one refunded ASAP.
Delivery took 11 days even though it said 2-3 at checkout. No updates the whole time.
@shopname your checkout is broken on Safari, the promo code just spins forever and never applies.
Can't log in after the latest update. It keeps saying 'session expired' on a loop.
The discount code SAVE20 from your email won't apply at checkout — it says 'invalid code' but it isn't expired.
Honestly I like the app, but search is useless. I type 'running shoes' and get phone cases.
Product was fine but the box arrived crushed and the tape was half off. Felt cheap for the price.
Anyone else getting double-charged on this app? Happened to me last week and support took 6 days to reply.
Returns are a nightmare. The return-label generator just gives me a 404 page. Been trying for 3 days.
Product photos don't load half the time, just grey boxes on the product pages. And I'm on fast wifi.
Smooth checkout, fast delivery, no complaints at all. Will definitely buy again.
The checkout button does nothing when I have a saved card selected. I have to delete the card and re-type it every single time.
why does your app send me 8 push notifications a day. I turned them off in settings and they came right back.
My refund was marked 'processed' 3 weeks ago and I still don't see the money. Order #77104.
Decent store but there's no way to filter by size, so I scroll forever and most things are sold out in my size anyway.
Got the wrong item — I ordered a medium in blue and received a small in black. And the return process is unclear.
shipping cost more than the product itself, and I only found out at the very last step. classic.
Promo codes NEVER work. I tried three different codes from your Instagram and they were all 'invalid'. Feels like a scam.
I need to change the shipping address on order #90233 but there is no option anywhere in the app to edit it.
Happy with the product. Only issue is the size guide was off — the 'M' runs very small.
The app is so slow to open, takes about 10 seconds on my Samsung, and then it lags while scrolling.
Heads up: their saved-card checkout is bugged on iOS, you have to re-type the card every time. Annoying.
I tried to use my store credit at checkout and it just disappeared — the order went through at full price.
Best shopping app I've used. The wishlist and one-tap reorder features are genuinely great.
Package never arrived. Tracking says 'delivered' but it's not here, and I've had no help from support yet.
the 'free returns' is a lie — they charged me a $7 'restocking fee' that was never mentioned.
Good selection but checkout forces me to create an account, there's no guest checkout. Annoying when I'm in a hurry.
My payment failed 3 times with my Mastercard but the money was held each time. Now I have 3 pending holds on my card.
Quick delivery! I just wish I could track it more precisely — the updates were pretty vague.
Added 4 items to my cart, came back an hour later and the cart was completely empty. Lost everything.
obsessed with my order, it came in 2 days and the packaging was so nice. 10/10
I think I'm seeing someone else's order details in my account history? There are several orders I never placed, with another person's name.
The app logged me out on its own and now my whole cart and wishlist are gone. Had to start completely over.
Item quality was great but it took two emails and a full week to get a simple answer out of support.
why is there still no dark mode in 2026, my eyes are begging you.
I got charged but never received an order confirmation email or number. I have no idea if my order even exists.
The 'apply all' on my gift card only applied part of the balance, and now I can't find where the rest went.
Flawless experience. Found what I wanted and checked out in under a minute.
The search bar doesn't handle typos at all. One letter off and I get zero results.
PSA: their app double-charged me AND the refund took forever. Check your statements, people.
I can't delete my account or remove my saved payment methods anywhere in settings. This feels intentional.
Really like it overall, but please add Apple Pay. Typing my card details every time is a pain.
The description said 'cotton' but the tag says 100% polyester. Misleading product info.
your size guide really needs work, I ordered my usual size and it came absolutely huge.
Checkout keeps failing with a generic 'something went wrong' and no detail. I really want this item before it sells out.
The app is fine but the constant 'only 2 left!' banners feel fake and pushy. Hard to trust them.
I ordered for a birthday and paid extra for express shipping, and it still arrived 4 days late. Ruined the gift.
Fast, clean, reliable. The reorder button saves me so much time every week.
checkout crashed on me 3 times before it finally went through, I almost gave up entirely.
